name: The Deathstalker Mantle

entries: {@i The Deathstalker Mantle} is a rare {@item Cloak||Cloak} that turns the wearer {@condition Invisible} for 2 turns after killing an enemy.
Let hill and hollow be a door
The wearer of this item gains:

entries.name: The Shadow Itself
entries: Once per turn when you kill an enemy, shroud yourself in primeval darkness to become {@condition Invisible} for 2 turns.
